name: Marketintel_GeoLocationInformation
description: The geographical location information used to discover stores.  This information will need be pass back with the result.

regionId.description: The region id of the geographical location.

superRegion.description: The super region of the geographical location.

h3Index.description: The H3Index value of the geographic location.

searchText.description: The text used to search for stores.

address.description: The address of the geographical location.
